This bag is cool, capturing a refined multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Extra-large capacity yet lightweight. Simple yet not simplistic. Almost every fashion blogger has one. Size: 34X23X12cm 70500
